title: desmidorchis flava
intro: Desmidorchis flava, also known as the yellow bee orchid, is a perennial orchid plant that is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Desmidorchis flava include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or powder for its medicinal purposes.
